scripts.check:syntax: node --check docs/lib.js && node --check docs/atomic-candidates.js && node --check docs/app.js && node --check docs/gemma-reranker.js && node --check docs/vllm-reranker.js && node --check docs/citation-audit.js
scripts.test:node: node tests/test_lib.js && node tests/test_atomic_candidates.js && node tests/test_atomic_app_contract.js && node tests/test_speed_primitives.js && node tests/test_vllm_reranker.js && node tests/test_citation_audit.js && node tests/test_fixture_harness.js && node tests/test_fixture_snapshot.js
scripts.test:python: python -m py_compile server/vllm_proxy_server.py && python -m unittest discover -s tests -p "test_*.py"
scripts.test: npm run check:syntax && npm run test:node && npm run test:python
